name: Palladyne AI Corp.
business: Palladyne AI Corp. is a U.S.-based technology company developing and offering embodied artificial intelligence software and collaborative autonomy solutions, advanced avionics, unmanned aerial vehicles, advanced UAV engineering services, and precision-manufactured components. The company's core AI software products (Palladyne IQ, SwarmOS, and Palladyne Pilot) are designed to enhance third-party robotic systems for defense and commercial/industrial markets. It also provides engineering design services and precision manufacturing for aerospace and defense customers.

exposures.sentence: Our AI/ML Foundational Technology operates on the edge by using real-time sensor inputs to adjust to a changing environment and accomplish the assigned task without the need to connect to the cloud to try to find and process an applicable LLM.

Our core AI software offerings, Palladyne IQ, SwarmOS and Palladyne Pilot, consist of full-stack, closed-loop autonomy software that is intended to enhance the functionality and operational effectiveness of third-party robotic systems across a range of applications.
Palladyne IQ enables industrial robots and cobots to adapt to variability in tasks, parts, and environments, thereby reducing the need for rigid automation, custom fixtures, and manual intervention.

We are positioning our defense business as a mid-tier U.S. technology prime defense contractor aiming to combine innovative autonomy, practical engineering and American production to bring intelligent systems into active service faster, safer and more cost-effectively than legacy approaches.
Using sensors like vision, LiDAR, radar and acoustic devices, robots gain situational awareness to perceive a dynamic and unstructured environment.
Utilizing perception functionality to assess and navigate environments, distinguishing between relevant components, obstacles and irrelevant factors, without relying on LLMs or cloud databases.
Our operations include machining, fabrication and assembly of aerospace and defense components.

catalysts.event: Launched Palladyne IQ 2.0 and secured first paid customer
catalysts.sentence: We recently launched Palladyne IQ 2.0 and have secured our first paid customer for that product.

catalysts.event: Expect AI/ML software licensing revenue in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have begun sales activities of our AI/ML software products and expect to derive revenue from licensing fees beginning in 2026.

catalysts.event: Continue commercialization, testing, and trials in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to continue commercialization efforts, internal testing and customer trials for our products throughout 2026.
